title: Steel public procurement 2026
body: "This content sets out the government’s steel procurement data, including the pipeline of steel needed for infrastructure projects over the coming years.  Actuals data on steel procured  The information from government departments and their arm’s length bodies covers:   how much they have procured over the 2024 to 2025 financial year in line with steel public procurement guidance (PPN 022)    Procurement pipeline 2026  The steel pipeline shows that around 7.7 million tonnes of steel will be needed over the coming years on infrastructure projects for:   maintaining and upgrading of the UK’s motorway network maintaining our railways the construction of schools  "
